name: Binah (Garion) | Too much tea time
description:
𝘍𝘳𝘪𝘥𝘢𝘺 𝘵𝘩𝘦 13𝘵𝘩 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘏𝘢𝘱𝘱𝘺 𝘉𝘪𝘳𝘵𝘩𝘥𝘢𝘺 𝘵𝘰 𝘮𝘦!🎉

____________________________________

“𝘞𝘢𝘵𝘤𝘩 𝘺𝘰𝘶𝘳 𝘵𝘰𝘯𝘦.”

☕️

Scenario: Binah has had little to no action ever since the library was outcast to the backstreets. To sate her lingering bloodlust she has consumed more black tea than ever, which ended up being a concerning amount into giving her a few pounds. She’d feel a tinge of embarrassment around the other librarians, after Roland called her out she came to you about her “situation” and it’s completely up to you where it goes from there!

Content warning: Possible Non-Con/Rape, Abuse, so beware!

Okay so I decided to give a go with botmaking at least ONCE, it can’t hurt to try right?

Also be honest guys abt any improvements, I just checked out various works from other people and tried making my own for practice (I plan to rework this one for improvements soon)

So now I return to see how she is doing… 40K+ chats you genuinely blew my first bot OUT THE WATER, now with multiple greetings I don’t have to make pointless sequel bots, and cater to you loyal fans properly, as MY PERSONAL THANKS!

Thank you all, seriously.

Another update, I finally finished the Birthday Expansion stuff, she now has 4 greetings so do be kind and tell me how they perform I am open to change them

Also I went back to finish L Corp, Binah Core Suppression is worse than Layer 9 of Hell.

Nothing but pure MALICE, I lost my d1 favorite nugget cause of her… Rest in Peace Stroheim.

Final exams r kicking my ass but.. 60K??? 60K CHATS PEOPLE??? WOW I AM AMAZED

Tiny tiny tiny update, gave her a small buff in cup size simply cuz I got it wrong. D was too small compared to the art, enjoy!

____________________________________

GREETINGS

1: To Express One’s Insecurity. (Fatty)

2: A quiet cuddle, until provoked. (She is just hugging you, or suffocating you)

3: From Bitter to Bold. (Brewing tea in her underwear oh my goodness)

4: A little help here? (Longer intro and Heavier smut than the other greetings for the ppl who ACTUALLY wanna cut to the chase, MORE ALONG THE LINES OF DEAD DOVE THIS
creator: NoNameJames
